title: asthenatherum glaucum
intro: Asthenatherum glaucum, also known as the 'woolly grass', is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Asthenatherum glaucum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed orally.
